title: Update text colors to black and reduce immunity page heading font size

requirements.text: Change all text colors across the website to black, overriding any existing color schemes in the CSS files

quotes: make all the text in my website black colour

acceptanceCriteria: All headings, paragraphs, and body text render in black color
Text color changes apply consistently across all pages
No colored text remains except for interactive elements like links and buttons where appropriate

requirements.text: Reduce the font size of the heading 'Ayurvedic Immunity Boosting Remedies | Natural Ways to Increase Immunity' on the immunity boosting page (frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/ImmunityBoostingPage.tsx) to ensure it is fully visible and readable over the background image

quotes: reduce the fornt size of (Ayurvedic Immunity Boosting Remedies | Natural Ways to Increase Immunity) as it is not visible due to the image

acceptanceCriteria: The heading text is fully visible and legible on the immunity boosting page
The reduced font size maintains visual hierarchy and readability
The heading does not overlap or become obscured by background images

constraints: Maintain existing layout structure and component hierarchy
Preserve the Tailwind CSS framework and utility classes
Do not modify immutable frontend paths including UI components and hooks
nonGoals: Changing button or link colors beyond making body text black
Modifying other page headings not specifically mentioned
Altering the overall design system or color palette beyond text colors
